Risk is Out There—Ignore at Your Own Peril
Most companies as giving minimal attention to external risks. Are you giving enough attention to what your competitors are doing? What about other changes going on around you?

Too many organizations fall into this trap. It's easy to think that internal decisions and actions fully account for the company's results. But this is a fallacy. Good strategic planners will spend a great deal of time, energy and focus on external forces.
Three Lean Principles You Can Apply Today

Transitioning into a lean operation can seem like a monumental task. You want to be more efficient, you want to improve quality and consistency of output, and to cut down on waste. The problem is, there's so much to do it's a daunting undertaking.
Start with these three things today:

1. Don't worry about fixing everything today
2. Focus on organization and efficiency
3. Develop a continuous improvement mindset

Do You Have the Guts to Develop a Successful Strategic Plan?

Strategy requires much more than extrapolating a budget. It requires an open, honest examination of the toughest issues the organization faces. Tough questions have to be asked. replies.msg: The word "negotiation" can conjure up negative images of conflict and struggle. But successful negotiation is about discussion aimed at reaching an agreement.

An adept negotiator uses skillful techniques to reach a deal without aggression. While negotiation skills can require some practice, becoming a good negotiator is within reach. It just requires following some basic guidelines that focus on the ultimate goal: successfully reaching an agreement acceptable to both parties.

replies.msg: 將要進入滑雪旺季，各位都出發到日本了嗎？滑雪雖然痛快又刺激，但同時也是一項高危運動，除了做好保護避免危險之外，事先買好旅遊保險也非常重要喔！
一些有經驗的滑雪者可能認為初學者才會需要滑雪保險，但其實因為中高級滑雪者會跑到難度更高的雪道挑戰自己，受傷機率可能會更高。如果是家庭出遊，同行者有老人或小孩的話就更加要小心旅行中出現意外，未雨綢繆才能安心暢玩喔！
每人每天只需要500日圓的超低價格就可以投保，保險金額最高達到500萬日圓，當天的保險當天也可以購買！如果您生病或受傷，保險公司會為您介紹相應醫院並為您支付治療費及藥費，您可以毫無負擔地接受治療！更有英文、中文、韓文的電話翻譯服務，您可以放心就診！
神秘力量席捲而來，全球陷入自殺狂潮。梅樂莉和她年幼的孩子展開一趟驚心動魄的旅程。珊卓·布拉克領銜主演。

The wall. We all hit it on occasion. For any number of possible reasons, we get stuck and just can't seem to get the things done that need to get done. See how you can get things done by learning to shake it off, adjust deadlines, create incentives and more.

For starters, don't be in a rush to start building a spreadsheet of projections and ordering inventory.

The Secret to Making a Strategic Plan Produce Results

Your company needs a strategy. But, as the CEO or other key executive, you can't delegate this downstream and expect to see bottom-line results. It won't happen, for one very simple reason. They can't make the hard decisions that are required to produce a viable strategic plan. It doesn't mean they aren't valuable for other tasks, such as gathering and organizing data. But this is an exercise that requires all of the top company brass to get involved, roll up their sleeves, ask the tough questions, and make informed decisions.

And once you have a plan, you must convert the plan into action. After all, if you don't execute a plan, what's the point of even creating it in the first place? Amazing as it may seem, it rarely happens. And when it does, incredible companies are built.

replies.msg: A Good Chart Makes Your Message Clear
Clearly communicating your message is crucial in business. Often, words and numbers alone just don't do the trick.
Get your point across with a picture or graphic. It puts information into clear perspective in a way that mere words or numbers alone can't.
電玩遊戲裡的反派角色破壞王雷夫渴望變成好人，但在他追尋英雄主義的過程中卻出現了一個威脅到整個遊樂場的致命敵人。
改編自經典格林童話故事的迪士尼電影，美麗的樂佩公主被邪惡的女巫葛索媽媽長期囚禁在遺世獨立的隱蔽高塔之中。
勇敢的年輕女子被囚禁在魔法城堡，結識有生命的時鐘與燭臺，並跟面惡心善的王子起了衝突。
攝影看似是男性的專利，但作為女生的你是不是已經擁有一部屬於自己的相機，為自己或身邊的朋友拍照？
各種飛鳥的生活習性各有不同，蹤影難測，要拍下雀鳥的美態實在要天時、地利、人和的配合。
香港人對旅遊的熱愛實在無容置疑，正因為大家對旅遊的熱愛，旅遊攝影亦成為其中一個最熱門的攝影主題。這個攝影遊以介紹實用技巧為主，以實際例子介紹城市建築的旅遊攝影技巧。學員代入旅客的角色，漫遊中環景點，發掘攝影新角度。
除了異國如畫的風光、具特色的人文風情，拍攝名勝古蹟及城市著名地標，也一定在你的攝影清單之內。面對宏偉華麗的建築，怎樣才可以拍出獨特的風格？今次便為大家解構箇中竅門！
雙子座流星雨剛於12月發生，你有把握機會將它記錄下來嗎？未有頭緒的話，一於參加由資深天文攝影師教授之基礎天文攝影課程，不但教授長焦月球及地景拍攝技巧，更可一嚐拍攝星流跡及銀河的滋味！
塱原由400多塊農地連接組成的濕地，為本港現存面積最大的淡水濕地。廣闊的平原形成一個香港罕有的田園美景，加夕陽的光線令田野的風景變化無窮。冬季的時候有許多候鳥停亦留於塱原濕地，成為香港另一個鳥攝熱門地點。
新界西北鄰近深圳邊陲有一大片魚塘，裡頭養殖了不同種類的淡水漁獲。對於攝影愛好者來說，位於雞公嶺的魚塘面向西方，日落時份夕陽斜暉映照水面，泛起片片金光，是配搭日落拍攝的好地點。
攝影題材千變萬化，擁有高質素器材固然重要，若能夠掌握合適設定和應用，才是提升攝影技巧的關鍵。【微距攝影】及【對焦及動態拍攝】兩項免費攝影課程，讓你在短時間內了解基本攝影技巧及器材運用，令你在拍攝時更加得心應手！
Create a Great Visual Business Plan

Writing a business plan isn't something to be taken lightly. A survey by the University of Oregon's Department of Economics found that companies that complete a business plan are twice as likely to grow and secure investment capital as those that don't.
Visuals help you showcase the best parts of your business for investors. With diagrams you can show:

1. Your Mission: Explain why the business exists
2. Your Objectives: Show your planned milestones
3. Your Team: Show them the right people for the job
4. Your Marketing Plan: Show how your price, product, and promotions will differ
5. Tactics. Show off your process
6. Finances: Present the right numbers to impress
🌮今個除夕，地道墨西哥風味陪您倒數。
Pantone 已經公佈咗 2019最流行嘅顏色將會係充滿活力嘅「珊瑚橙 Living Coral」，係一隻帶金調嘅橙色。無論係化妝品、手袋、服飾上，亞洲人都好容易carry到！
置身英倫球場感受現場熾熱氣氛。
你也覺得糕餅、餡餅好吃卻很難做嗎？怕自己沒辦法做出好吃的古早味點心嗎？那就快來看小編推薦的食譜吧！包你輕鬆學會這些舊而經典的美味！
免費upgrade套房、延遲check out、免用享用酒店早餐、使用行政酒廊、優先通道……是不是很想擁有一系列的酒店貴賓禮遇？
Which Visual is Right for Your Presentation
Whether you're writing a business report, technical paper, or making a presentation, using diagrams or graphics can help clarify your message.
But which visual is best for the information at hand?
Learn about bar graphs, line graphs, pie charts, flowcharts, mind maps, Gantt charts, timelines, and maps, and more.
忙著為別人挑聖誕禮物，也別忘了自己。

Graphics are an invaluable tool that can make any report better—regardless of its size, scope or complexity. Problem is, most of us aren't trained graphics designers. This may make the process seem a bit overwhelming.

- Presenting numerical data to show trends, distributions, or comparisons.
- Giving instructions or explaining a process to avoid being misunderstood.
- Presenting information for choices or decisions that need to be made.
Read the rest of the article to find out what graphics to use and how to make them.
